tracks.rawText: 4:56freaklesUploadHard rock with heavy blues influences, Distorted electric guitar plays a syncopated, palm-muted riff centered on a low E pedal point, The drum kit features a prominent, dry snare and a steady eighth-note hi-hat pattern, An overdriven bass guitar mirrors the guitar riff with a thick, mid-range presence, The arrangement is built on a repetitive four-bar loop with occasional open-chord accents and cymbal crashes, Key of E minor, Tempo is 120 BPM7PublishRemix
tracks.title: freakles
